mapper.select: SELECT id, message_id, product_id, change_quantity, change_type, order_id, status, remark, create_time, update_time FROM stock_change_log WHERE message_id = #{messageId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_change_log (message_id, product_id, change_quantity, change_type, order_id, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{productId}, #{changeQuantity}, #{changeType}, #{orderId}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
